message:
fix: deduplicate agent bead IDs when rig name equals derived prefix

When a rig's name equals its derived prefix (e.g., "ff" with prefix "ff"),
AgentBeadIDWithPrefix produced stuttered IDs like "ff-ff-witness" instead
of "ff-witness". This caused lookup failures because the routing layer
couldn't find the double-prefixed IDs.

Fix AgentBeadIDWithPrefix to collapse the rig component when prefix == rig,
and update ValidateAgentID and ParseAgentBeadID to handle the collapsed form
correctly, including returning the prefix as the rig for downstream callers.

Fixes #1877

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
